𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰: Yeah, hi. A bit busy, y'all, sorry! <3 For having not released a bot yesterday, I hope a spicy Nikolai is compensation enough? If it isn't, then I apologize 🙏 Probably won't be able to update daily as often, but I'll try to remain consistent. Thanks for all the support, everyone <3 Thinking maybe I'll do another Dazai or Chuuya soon, potentially spicy or angsty. We'll see ;)
